free_text: Investigation of parameters of angular distribution of
inelastica alpha-partial scattering of atomic nuclei
N.N.Pavlova et al., "Tables of differential elastic
and inelastic scattering of alpha-particles from 30
to 50 MeV with Z=6 to 30 nuclides", Preprint,
No information on the source of uncertainty
Statistics of registered pulses, which did
not exceed 3-5% in general, but reached 10-15% at the
minima of the cross section and at large angles
(5-8% in general, but some cases up to 15%)
On. Data received form Timur Zholdybayev
